sqlMap.sql:
WHERE U.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND U.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#
U.DISPLAYNAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchStr#), '%')
U.DESCRIPTION LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchStr#), '%')
U.DISPLAYNAME2 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchStr#), '%')
U.DESCRIPTION2 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #searchStr#), '%')

WHERE l.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND l.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
t.TYPE_NAME = 'document'
t.TYPE_NAME = 'music'
t.TYPE_NAME = 'video'
t.TYPE_NAME = 'image'
t.TYPE_NAME = 'zip'
t.TYPE_NAME is null
l.FILE_EXT LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #fileExt#), '%')
l.FILE_NAME LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #fileName#), '%')
l.CREATE_NAME1 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #userName#), '%')
l.CREATE_NAME2 LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #userName#), '%')
(l.CREATE_DATE >= #startDate# AND l.CREATE_DATE <= #endDate#)
l.LOG_TYPE = #actionType#

insert.selectKey: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_CONFIG WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# )
insert.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_CONFIG SET UPLOAD_LIMIT = #uploadLimit#, TOTAL_LIMIT = #personalLimit# WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_CONFIG WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT U.CN AS CN, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN U.DISPLAYNAME ELSE U.DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DISPLAY_NAME, U.DEPARTMENT AS DEPARTMENT_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN U.DESCRIPTION ELSE U.DESCRIPTION2 END AS DEPARTMENT_NAME, U.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AS COMPANY_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN U.COMPANY ELSE U.COMPANY2 END AS COMPANY_NAME, IF(W.TOTAL_CAPACITY IS NOT NULL, W.TOTAL_CAPACITY, IFNULL(C.TOTAL_LIMIT, 0)) AS TOTAL_CAPACITY, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN U.TITLE ELSE U.TITLE2 END AS JOB_TITLE, ( SELECT IFNULL(SUM(CAST(F.FILE_SIZE AS INT)), 0) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE F WHERE F.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND F.CREATE_ID = #userId# ) AS TOTAL_USED, U.TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER U LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_USER W ON U.CN = W.CN AND U.TENANT_ID = W.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_CONFIG C ON U.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = C.COMPANY_ID AND U.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE U.CN = #userId# AND U.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT U.CN AS CN, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN U.DISPLAYNAME ELSE U.DISPLAYNAME2 END AS DISPLAY_NAME, U.DEPARTMENT AS DEPARTMENT_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN U.DESCRIPTION ELSE U.DESCRIPTION2 END AS DEPARTMENT_NAME, U.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AS COMPANY_ID, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN U.COMPANY ELSE U.COMPANY2 END AS COMPANY_NAME, IF(W.TOTAL_CAPACITY IS NOT NULL, W.TOTAL_CAPACITY, IFNULL(C.TOTAL_LIMIT, 0)) AS TOTAL_CAPACITY, CASE WHEN #primary# = '1' THEN U.TITLE ELSE U.TITLE2 END AS JOB_TITLE, ( SELECT IFNULL(SUM(CAST(F.FILE_SIZE AS INT)), 0) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE F WHERE F.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND F.CREATE_ID = U.CN ) AS TOTAL_USED, U.TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER U LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_USER W ON U.CN = W.CN AND U.TENANT_ID = W.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_CONFIG C ON U.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = C.COMPANY_ID AND U.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID
ORDER BY $realColmn$ $order$, DEPARTMENT_NAME ASC, DISPLAY_NAME ASC
ORDER BY DEPARTMENT_NAME ASC, DISPLAY_NAME ASC
LIMIT #startPoint#, #pageSize#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_USERMASTER U LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_USER W ON U.CN = W.CN AND U.TENANT_ID = W.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_CONFIG C ON U.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = C.COMPANY_ID AND U.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID

insert.selectKey: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_USER WHERE CN = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# )
insert.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_USER SET TOTAL_CAPACITY = #totalCapacity# WHERE CN = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

sqlMap.select:
SELECT l.LOG_ID AS LOG_ID, CASE WHEN t.TYPE_ICON IS NOT NULL THEN t.TYPE_ICON ELSE (SELECT TYPE_ICON FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE WHERE FILE_EXT = 'unknown' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) END AS FILE_TYPE, l.FILE_NAME AS FILE_NAME, l.FILE_SIZE AS FILE_SIZE, l.FILE_EXT AS FILE_EXT, l.LOG_TYPE AS LOG_TYPE, l.CREATE_ID AS CREATE_ID, l.CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME1, l.CREATE_NAME2 AS CREATE_NAME2, DATE_ADD(l.CREATE_DATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) AS CREATE_DATE, l.COMPANY_ID AS COMPANY_ID, l.TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_LOG l LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE t ON l.FILE_EXT = t.FILE_EXT AND l.TENANT_ID = t.TENANT_ID
ORDER BY
CAST($realColmn$ AS INT) $order$,
$realColmn$ $order$,
l.CREATE_DATE DESC, CAST(l.LOG_ID AS INT) DESC
ORDER BY l.CREATE_DATE DESC, CAST(l.LOG_ID AS INT) DESC
LIMIT #startPoint#, #pageSize#
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_LOG l LEFT JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILETYPE t ON l.FILE_EXT = t.FILE_EXT AND l.TENANT_ID = t.TENANT_ID

insert.selectKey: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT LOG_ID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_LOG WHERE LOG_ID = #logId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# )
insert.isEqual: INSERT INTO TBL_WEBFOLDER_LOG ( LOG_ID, FILE_TYPE, FILE_NAME, FILE_SIZE, FILE_EXT, LOG_TYPE, CREATE_ID, CREATE_NAME1, CREATE_NAME2, CREATE_DATE, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #logId#, #fileType#, #fileName#, #fileSize#, #fileExt#, #logType#, #createId#, #createName1#, #createName2#, #createDate#, #companyId#, #tenantId# )
insert.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_LOG SET FILE_TYPE = #fileType#, FILE_NAME = #fileName#, FILE_SIZE = #fileSize#, FILE_EXT = #fileExt#, LOG_TYPE = #logType#, CREATE_ID = #createId#, CREATE_NAME1 = #createName1#, CREATE_NAME2 = #createName2#, CREATE_DATE = #createDate#, COMPANY_ID = #companyId# WHERE LOG_ID = #logId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

insert.selectKey: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT FOLDER_ID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE FOLDER_ID = #folderId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# )
insert.isEqual: INSERT INTO TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER ( FOLDER_ID, FOLDER_NAME1, FOLDER_NAME2, FOLDER_TYPE, FOLDER_PATH, FOLDER_STEP, FOLDER_LEVEL, FOLDER_UPPER, USE_STATUS, OWNER_ID, CREATE_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATE_NAME1, CREATE_NAME2, UPDATE_ID, UPDATE_DATE, COMPANY_ID, DELETER_ID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #folderId#, #folerName1#, #folerName2#, #folderType#, #folderPath#, #folderStep#, #folderLevel#, #folderUpper#, #useStatus#, #ownerId#, #createId#, #createDate#, #createName1#, #createName2#, #updateId#, #updateDate#, #companyId#, #deleterId#, #tenantId# )
insert.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER SET FOLDER_NAME1 = #folerName1#, FOLDER_NAME2 = #folerName2#, FOLDER_TYPE = #folderType#, FOLDER_PATH = #folderPath#, FOLDER_STEP = #folderStep#, FOLDER_LEVEL = #folderLevel#, FOLDER_UPPER = #folderUpper#, USE_STATUS = #useStatus#, OWNER_ID = #ownerId#, CREATE_ID = #createId#, CREATE_DATE = #createDate#, CREATE_NAME1 = #createName1#, CREATE_NAME2 = #createName2#, UPDATE_ID = #updateId#, UPDATE_DATE = #updateDate#, COMPANY_ID = #companyId#, DELETER_ID = #deleterId# WHERE FOLDER_ID = #folderId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

insert.selectKey: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT FOLDER_ID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE OWNER_ID = #ownerId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND FOLDER_TYPE = #folderType# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# )
insert.isEqual: INSERT INTO TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER ( FOLDER_ID, FOLDER_NAME1, FOLDER_NAME2, FOLDER_TYPE, FOLDER_PATH, FOLDER_STEP, FOLDER_LEVEL, FOLDER_UPPER, USE_STATUS, OWNER_ID, CREATE_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATE_NAME1, CREATE_NAME2, UPDATE_ID, UPDATE_DATE, COMPANY_ID, DELETER_ID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #folderId#, #folerName1#, #folerName2#, #folderType#, #folderPath#, #folderStep#, #folderLevel#, #folderUpper#, #useStatus#, #ownerId#, #createId#, #createDate#, #createName1#, #createName2#, #updateId#, #updateDate#, #companyId#, #deleterId#, #tenantId# )
insert.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER SET FOLDER_NAME1 = #folerName1#, FOLDER_NAME2 = #folerName2#, UPDATE_ID = #updateId#, UPDATE_DATE = #updateDate#, DELETER_ID = #deleterId# WHERE FOLDER_NAME1 = #folerName1# AND FOLDER_NAME2 = #folerName2# AND OWNER_ID = #ownerId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

insert.selectKey: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT SEQ_ID, TENANT_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER WHERE SEQ_ID = #seqId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# )
insert.isEqual: INSERT INTO TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER ( SEQ_ID, USER_ID, USER_TYPE, FOLDER_ID, CREATE_ID, CREATE_DATE, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #seqId#, #userId#, #userType#, #folderId#, #createId#, #createDate#, #companyId#, #tenantId# )
insert.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER SET USER_ID = #userId#, USER_TYPE = #userType#, FOLDER_ID = #folderId#, CREATE_ID = #createId#, CREATE_DATE = #createDate#, COMPANY_ID = #companyId# WHERE SEQ_ID = #seqId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER WHERE FOLDER_ID = #folderId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
DELETE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER WHERE USER_ID = #userId# AND USER_TYPE = 'chief' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_webfolder_folder SET FOLDER_TYPE = #folderType#, UPDATE_DATE = #updateTime#, UPDATE_ID = #userId#, OWNER_ID = #ownerId#, FOLDER_PATH = replace(FOLDER_PATH, #oldPath#, #newPath#), FOLDER_LEVEL = FOLDER_LEVEL + #levelDistance# WHERE FOLDER_PATH like concat(concat(#oldPath#, '_'), '%') AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT IFNULL(SUM(CAST(f.FILE_SIZE AS INT)), 0) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE f JOIN TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER u ON f.TENANT_ID = u.TENANT_ID AND f.FOLDER_ID = u.FOLDER_ID WHERE u.FOLDER_PATH LIKE CONCAT(#folderPath#, '%') AND f.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
